name: CustomPartBase.CustomPartPositioningType
summary: Defines the type of the positioning.

enum_values.name: POSITIONING_BY_CENTER_OF_BOUNDING_BOX
enum_values.summary: Positioning happens based on total extrema of objects. Default value. Same as "Use center of the bounding box in positioning" value on in custom component wizard

enum_values.name: POSITIONING_BY_INPUTPOINTS
enum_values.summary: Positioning happens based on input points and extrema of objects. Similar to exact positioning in custom parts Same as "Use center of the bounding box in positioning" value off in custom component wizard
